about.name: Mike  Waitindi
about.title: Full-stack Developer | ICT Officer | Network Administrator | Web 3 Ethuasist
about.description: A visionary IT Profesional with a rich tapestry of expertise in full-stack development, ICT oversight, and network mastery. As a fervent Web 3 advocate, Mike weaves cutting-edge innovation into every project, crafting transformative digital experiences that propel organizations into the future.

experience.role: ICT Officer Council of Legal Education
experience.description: Currently serving as an ICT Officer the Council of Legal Education, gaining hands-on experience in information technology support and system administration within the legal education sector.

Helped troubleshoot technical issues reported by staff, resolving them quickly and effectively. Assisted with the maintenance and management of the court"s computer systems and networks. Also assisted with website maintenance and updates.

experience.role: IEBC ICT Officer - Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission
experience.description: Served as ICT Officer during the August 2022 polls, overseeing maintenance and troubleshooting of KEIMS kit and setting up network infrastructure in the tallying centre for Gatundu South constituency.
Worked as a freelance junior software developer, primarily focusing on website development for clients on a contract basis, delivering custom web solutions and applications.
